prerequisites: An active PersistIq account with access to the Integrations settings page (the API key is shown at the bottom of that page).
A PersistIq API key (the only required configuration field, api_key).

authMethods.name: API key (x-api-key header)
authMethods.summary: PersistIq authenticates every REST request with a single API key. The key is sent in the x-api-key HTTP header against the https://api.persistiq.com/v1 base URL. Supply this value in the connector's required api_key field; no OAuth or username/password is used.

setupSteps.title: Sign in to PersistIq and open Integrations
setupSteps.body: Log in to your PersistIq account. Click your profile icon (your initials) in the bottom left corner of the page, then click Integrations to open the Integrations settings tab.

setupSteps.title: Copy your API key
setupSteps.body: On the Integrations page, locate the API Key (shown toward the bottom of the page) and copy it. This single key authorizes API access to your PersistIq data.

setupSteps.title: Provide the API key to the connector
setupSteps.body: Paste the copied key into the connector's required api_key field. The connector sends it as the x-api-key header on requests to https://api.persistiq.com/v1, so no other credentials are needed.

sources.title: PersistIQ connection setup - Skyvia (where to find the API key)
PersistIQ destination - Twilio Segment (API key on Integrations page)
PersistIq Node API wrapper source (x-api-key header, api.persistiq.com base URL)
